mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicine_record(elderly_id, medicine_id, dosage, use_time, operator_id, remark, is_deleted) VALUES(#{elderlyId}, #{medicineId}, #{dosage}, #{useTime}, #{operatorId}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE medicine_record
elderly_id = #{elderlyId}, medicine_id = #{medicineId}, dosage = #{dosage}, use_time = #{useTime}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE medicine_record SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medicine_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT mr.*, e.name as elderlyName, m.medicine_name as medicineName, u.real_name as operatorName FROM medicine_record mr LEFT JOIN elderly e ON mr.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN medicine m ON mr.medicine_id = m.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON mr.operator_id = u.id WHERE mr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC

SELECT mr.*, e.name as elderlyName, m.medicine_name as medicineName, u.real_name as operatorName FROM medicine_record mr LEFT JOIN elderly e ON mr.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN medicine m ON mr.medicine_id = m.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON mr.operator_id = u.id WHERE mr.elderly_id = #{elderlyId} AND mr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC
